---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Kova
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the pain point or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would help:

```bash
# Example workflow showing how the feature would be used
kova activate
# ... your scenario here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g., links to similar features in other tools).
